provenance.reconstruction_notes: Reconstructed from memory/2026-05-16.md Cron Health & Efficiency, memory/2026-05-17.md Learning & Growth, and chronic-issues.json#contemplation-state-desync-after-partial-run. The checklist filename carries an earlier May12 placeholder, but the verified incident occurred across 2026-05-16/17: a completed Contemplation pass survived in durable logs/playbooks/chronic state, while the final contemplation-state.json rewrite was lost after a gateway restart/error. No private operator details or internal hostnames are included.

snapshots.summary: Cron/run history showed the prior Contemplation run ended error after the durable work was already logged.
Daily memory entry plus on-disk playbook/chronic updates were used as the recovery ledger.

payload.result_summary: Loaded cron status, work-loop playbooks, contemplation delivery rules, chronic issues, and current contemplation-state before selecting the topic.
Found long work-loop runs relative to the old lock TTL and recent Contemplation errors caused by alert transport rather than failed durable work.

payload.summary: Updated work-loop lock TTL guidance to 58 minutes and changed Contemplation alert handling so Signal failures degrade to durable memory fallback.
Recorded work-loop lock TTL mismatch, Signal delivery hygiene fix, and the completed Cron Health & Efficiency Contemplation entry.

payload.intent: Continue after durable playbook/state/log writes and complete the final contemplation-state.json rewrite.
payload.result_summary: Run ended with an error after about 443 seconds because the gateway restarted or transport failed before the final contemplation-state rewrite landed.
State still said the previous completed topic was Priority Alignment at 06:15Z; it did not reflect the later Cron Health pass recorded in daily memory.

payload.summary: Repaired contemplation-state from the daily memory entry and verified cron history: marked Cron Health reviewed at 2026-05-16T19:15Z and added the missed insight.
Added a preflight reconciliation rule for later daily Contemplation entries whose state rewrite was lost after an interrupted or errored run.
A completed metacognition pass existed in durable memory and playbook/chronic updates, but mutable rotation state stayed stale until the next run reconciled it.
payload.label: partial_run_desync
